creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ohauer
Date: Tue Feb  4 05:50:01 2014
New Revision: 342486
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/342486
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r342486/

Log:
  - Add GSSAPI support (default=off)
  
  PR:		ports/186433
  Submitted by:	Ryan Steinmetz <zi@FreeBSD.org>

Modified:
  head/www/serf/Makefile

Modified: head/www/serf/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/serf/Makefile	Tue Feb  4 05:31:32 2014	(r342485)
+++ head/www/serf/Makefile	Tue Feb  4 05:50:01 2014	(r342486)
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 
 SUB_FILES=	libserf-1.la
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS GSSAPI
 
 SCONS_ENV=	# empty
 SCONS_BUILDENV=	# empty
@@ -32,6 +32,12 @@ SCONS_ARGS+=	CC=${CC}
 SCONS_ARGS+=	CFLAGS="${CFLAGS}"
 SCONS_INSTALL_TARGET=	install --install-sandbox=${STAGEDIR}
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MGSSAPI}
+SCONS_ARGS+=	GSSAPI="/usr"
+.endif
+
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/^Requires.private/d' ${WRKSRC}/build/serf.pc.in
 
_______________________________________________
